hero.title: Protect Your Web3 Assets
hero.subtitle: Scan and revoke token approvals to secure your wallet from potential exploits. Free, private, and open source.

scan.title: Scan Approvals
scan.description: Instantly view all token approvals granted by your wallet across multiple chains.

risk.title: Risk Assessment
risk.description: Automatic risk scoring helps you identify dangerous unlimited approvals.

revoke.title: One-Click Revoke
revoke.description: Revoke any approval with a single transaction. Take back control of your assets.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: No login, no database, zero data collection. Your wallet, your privacy.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: No fees, no premium tiers. Security should be accessible to everyone.

multichain.title: Multi-Chain
multichain.description: Support for Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, and more.

cta.title: Ready to Secure Your Wallet?
cta.subtitle: Connect your wallet and start scanning for risky approvals.

connectWallet.title: Connect Your Wallet
connectWallet.description: Connect your wallet to scan for token approvals and protect your assets from potential exploits.

approvals.title: Token Approvals
approvals.description: Review and revoke token approvals to secure your wallet

demoBanner.title: Demo Mode
demoBanner.description: GoldRush API key not configured. Showing simulated approval data for demonstration. Get your free API key at goldrush.dev and add it to .env.local.

table.noApprovalsDesc: Great news! Your wallet has no active token approvals.

footer.description: A free, privacy-first tool for managing token approvals.
